sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ لِشِرَاءِ دَوَاءٍ لِلسُّعَالِ.
sentences.translation: Otišao sam u apoteku da kupim lijek protiv kašlja.
sentences.translationEn: I went to the pharmacy to buy cough medicine.

sentences.arabic: قَدَّمَ لِي الصَّيْدَلَانِيُّ نَصَائِحَ مُفِيدَةً حَوْلَ صِحَّتِي.
sentences.translation: Farmaceut mi je dao korisne savjete o mom zdravlju.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist gave me useful advice about my health.

sentences.arabic: شَرِبْتُ الدَّوَاءَ وَشَعَرْتُ بِتَحَسُّنٍ بَعْدَ وَقْتٍ قَصِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Popio sam lijek i osjetio sam se bolje nakon kratkog vremena.
sentences.translationEn: I took the medicine and felt better after a short time.
